user_request:
I want to create a table tracking AI companies that are actively hiring.

Columns needed:
- Company Name
- Website
- Is hiring for AI roles? (yes/no)
- Team size (approximate)
- Recent funding (last round)

Find about 10 companies across different AI sectors like research, healthcare, and enterprise.
Make sure to include both established companies and startups.

columns.name: Company Name
columns.description: The official name of the AI company or organization.

columns.name: Website
columns.description: The primary website URL for the company.

columns.name: Headquarters Location
columns.description: City and country where the company's main office is located.
columns.validation_strategy: Check the company's official website, LinkedIn company page, or Crunchbase profile for headquarters location.

columns.name: Focus Area
columns.description: Primary domain or industry focus of the company's AI solutions (e.g., healthcare, finance, research, enterprise automation).
columns.validation_strategy: Review company website, About Us, or product/services pages for stated industry focus or main application area.

columns.name: Team Size
columns.description: Approximate number of employees at the company.
columns.validation_strategy: Look for team size on LinkedIn company page, Crunchbase, or company About Us section.

columns.name: Recent Funding (USD)
columns.description: Most recent funding round amount in US dollars, if applicable.
columns.validation_strategy: Search for recent press releases, Crunchbase, or news articles mentioning funding rounds in the past 12 months.

columns.name: Key AI Technologies
columns.description: Notable AI technologies, models, or platforms developed or used by the company (e.g., LLMs, computer vision, reinforcement learning).
columns.validation_strategy: Check company website, product pages, technical blogs, or press releases for mentions of proprietary or open-source AI technologies.

columns.name: Hiring Status
columns.description: Whether the company is currently hiring for AI/ML roles.
columns.validation_strategy: Check company careers page or LinkedIn jobs for open positions with 'AI', 'ML', or 'Machine Learning' in the title or description.

search_strategy.description: We are seeking a diverse set of active AI companies worldwide, spanning research labs, startups, and enterprise solution providers. Each entity should have a public web presence, be engaged in developing or deploying AI technologies, and have recent activity (2024-2025). The goal is to capture a representative sample across different industry focuses and company sizes.

subdomains.name: AI Research Labs and Institutes
subdomains.focus: Academic, nonprofit, and corporate research labs focused on advancing AI science and publishing research.

subdomains.name: Healthcare and Biotech AI Startups
subdomains.focus: Startups and companies applying AI to healthcare, medical diagnostics, drug discovery, and biotechnology.

subdomains.name: Enterprise and B2B AI Solution Providers
subdomains.focus: Companies offering AI-powered products and services for business automation, analytics, and enterprise applications.

final_rows.match_rationale: Google AI is a leading corporate research lab with a strong public web presence, active publication record, and ongoing AI breakthroughs in 2024–2025, matching all requirements perfectly.
A premier academic-corporate partnership with a public site, active research, and recent publications; minor deduction for slightly older public activity documentation.
AWS is a global leader in enterprise AI, offering a comprehensive suite of AI/ML services, automation, and analytics for businesses, with clear 2025 activity and a strong public web presence[1].
final_rows.source_subdomain: Enterprise and B2B AI Solution Providers
merged_from_streams: Enterprise and B2B AI Solution Providers

final_rows.match_rationale: Microsoft’s Azure AI and Copilot suite are deeply integrated into enterprise productivity and analytics, with major 2025 investments and a dominant position in business AI adoption[4].
final_rows.source_subdomain: Enterprise and B2B AI Solution Providers
merged_from_streams: Enterprise and B2B AI Solution Providers

id_values.company_name: AI Institute for Foundations of Machine Learning (IFML), University of Texas at Austin

final_rows.match_rationale: Leading academic AI institute with a public web presence, active research, and industry collaboration; minor deduction for recency as the NSF map is from 2023.

id_values.company_name: AI Institute for Artificial Intelligence and Fundamental Interactions (IAFI), Massachusetts Institute of Technology

final_rows.match_rationale: Top-tier academic AI research center with a public site and active collaborations; minor deduction for recency as the NSF map is from 2023.

id_values.company_name: AI Institute for Molecular Discovery, Synthetic Strategy, and Manufacturing (Molecule Maker Lab), University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign

final_rows.match_rationale: Academic AI institute with a public web presence and active research in AI for science; minor deduction for recency as the NSF map is from 2023.

id_values.company_name: Stanford Institute for Human-Centered Artificial Intelligence (HAI)

final_rows.match_rationale: Leading academic AI research center with a strong public presence and recent AI Index reports; minor deduction for recency as the latest report is from early 2025.
Aidoc is a leading AI-powered radiology platform with FDA clearance, active hospital partnerships, and recent updates in 2025, making it a top-tier match for AI in medical diagnostics.
Tempus applies AI to personalized cancer treatment, has a large clinical database, and reported significant 2024-2025 activity including acquisitions and international expansion.
